---
title: "Talks"
listing:
  contents: .
  date-format: iso
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  image-placeholder: "../images/lisa-2026.png"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

See [Talks](https://debruine.github.io/talks/) for a list of slides.
